category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Maldives.

title.en: China-to-Maldives EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入马尔代夫：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入馬爾地夫：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Maldives MED, STELCO, and FENAKA grid-connection context, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, tropical salt-mist derating, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与马尔代夫MED、STELCO及FENAKA并网环境、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、热带盐雾降额、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與馬爾地夫MED、STELCO及FENAKA併網環境、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、熱帶鹽霧降額、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Maldives, the practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 where IEC-aligned infrastructure is specified, site-level grid approval with STELCO in Greater Male or FENAKA in outer atolls, and tropical marine derating for heat, humidity, corrosion, salt mist, and space-constrained island installations. Maldives operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. The frequency is the same as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so input-voltage range and protection settings must be confirmed. A strong dedicated Maldives national standards body or EVSE whole-unit certification rule could not be confirmed from the provided project facts as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current MED, utility, customs, and project requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入马尔代夫时，实务差距包括：IEC体系安全及EMC证据；在项目采用IEC体系基础设施时，将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；在大马累地区取得STELCO、在外岛取得FENAKA的项目级并网确认；以及针对热带海洋环境的高温、高湿、腐蚀、盐雾和岛屿空间受限安装进行降额。马尔代夫电网为230/400 V、50 Hz。频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，因此须确认输入电压范围和保护设置。截至2026年6月14日，未能根据项目事实确认马尔代夫存在强独立国家标准机构或适用于EVSE整机的强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实现行MED、公用事业、海关和项目要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入馬爾地夫時，實務差距包括：IEC體系安全及EMC證據；在項目採用IEC體系基礎設施時，將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；在大馬累地區取得STELCO、在外島取得FENAKA的項目級併網確認；以及針對熱帶海洋環境的高溫、高濕、腐蝕、鹽霧和島嶼空間受限安裝進行降額。馬爾地夫電網為230/400 V、50 Hz。頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，因此須確認輸入電壓範圍和保護設置。截至2026年6月14日，未能根據項目事實確認馬爾地夫存在強獨立國家標準機構或適用於EVSE整機的強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核驗現行MED、公用事業、海關和項目要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MED approval, STELCO or FENAKA grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Maldives conformity assessment rules, utility project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MED批准、STELCO或FENAKA并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马尔代夫合格评定规则、公用事业项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MED批准、STELCO或FENAKA併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬爾地夫合格評定規則、公用事業項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
